nodes.name: OpenAI
nodes.subtitle: AI Research Laboratory
nodes.description: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to ensuring that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity.

events.title: OpenAI Founded
events.description: OpenAI was founded in San Francisco by Sam Altman, Elon Musk, and others, with US$1 billion in pledges.

events.title: GPT-1 Released
events.description: OpenAI published "Improving Language Understanding by Generative Pre-Training", introducing the original GPT model.

events.title: Transition to "Capped-Profit"
events.description: OpenAI shifted from non-profit to a capped-for-profit structure.

events.title: ChatGPT Launched
events.description: ChatGPT was launched globally, gaining 1 million users in just 5 days.

nodes.name: ChatGPT
nodes.subtitle: Conversational AI System
nodes.description: ChatGPT is a conversational model from OpenAI that is formulated to converse safely and effectively.

nodes.name: GPT-4
nodes.subtitle: Multimodal Large Language Model
nodes.description: GPT-4 is OpenAI’s most advanced system, producing safer and more useful responses.

nodes.name: Anthropic
nodes.subtitle: AI Safety & Research
nodes.description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that builds reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

events.title: Anthropic Founded
events.description: Anthropic was founded by former OpenAI members, prioritizing AI safety and alignment research.

events.title: Claude Released
events.description: Anthropic released its first AI assistant, Claude, emphasizing a constitutional AI approach.

events.title: Amazon Investment
events.description: Amazon announced an investment of up to $4 billion in Anthropic.

events.title: Claude 3 Family
events.description: Anthropic introduced the Claude 3 model family (Haiku, Sonnet, Opus), achieving state-of-the-art benchmarks.

nodes.name: Claude 3
nodes.subtitle: Next Generation AI Model Family
nodes.description: Claude 3 is a family of foundation models by Anthropic (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) offering strong performance and safety.

nodes.name: Claude
nodes.subtitle: AI Assistant by Anthropic
nodes.description: Claude is a next-generation AI assistant built for work and designed to be safe, accurate, and secure.

nodes.name: Google
nodes.subtitle: Search & Technology Giant
nodes.description: Google is a multinational technology company focusing on search, cloud computing, computer software, quantum computing, e-commerce, and AI.

events.title: Google Founded
events.description: Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin.

events.title: DeepMind Acquisition
events.description: Google acquired DeepMind Technologies for over $500 million.

events.title: Transformer Published
events.description: Google Brain researchers published the "Attention Is All You Need" paper.

events.title: Gemini Announcement
events.description: Google announced the Gemini multimodal AI models.

nodes.name: Gemini
nodes.subtitle: Google’s Multimodal AI
nodes.description: Gemini is the largest and most capable AI model from Google DeepMind, designed to be highly multimodal.

nodes.name: Transformer
nodes.subtitle: Attention-based Neural Network Architecture
nodes.description: The Transformer is a deep learning architecture based on attention mechanisms, introduced in "Attention Is All You Need".

nodes.name: Attention Is All You Need
nodes.subtitle: Seminal AI Paper
nodes.description: The research paper published by Google researchers that introduced the Transformer architecture.

nodes.name: Cursor
nodes.subtitle: The AI Code Editor
nodes.description: Cursor is an AI-powered code editor built to make you extraordinarily productive.

nodes.name: GitHub Copilot
nodes.subtitle: Your AI Pair Programmer
nodes.description: GitHub Copilot uses the OpenAI Codex to suggest code and entire functions in real-time.

nodes.name: Meta
nodes.subtitle: Social Technology Company
nodes.description: Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses, and is a major player in open-source AI.

nodes.name: Llama 3
nodes.subtitle: Open Foundation Model
nodes.description: Meta Llama 3 is a widely used open-weights large language model optimized for dialogue and general capabilities.

nodes.name: Hugging Face
nodes.subtitle: The AI community building the future
nodes.description: Hugging Face is an open-source data science and machine learning platform that acts as a hub for AI models and datasets.

nodes.name: PyTorch
nodes.subtitle: Deep Learning Framework
nodes.description: An open source machine learning framework that accelerates the path from research prototyping to production deployment.

nodes.name: Ilya Sutskever
nodes.subtitle: AI Researcher & Co-founder
nodes.description: Ilya Sutskever is an influential AI researcher, co-founder of OpenAI, and key contributor to many deep learning breakthroughs.

nodes.name: Sam Altman
nodes.subtitle: CEO of OpenAI
nodes.description: Entrepreneur and investor, known as the CEO of OpenAI.

nodes.name: Dario Amodei
nodes.subtitle: CEO of Anthropic
nodes.description: Co-founder and CEO of Anthropic, former VP of Research at OpenAI.

nodes.name: xAI
nodes.subtitle: Understand the Universe
nodes.description: xAI is an artificial intelligence company founded by Elon Musk, aiming to understand the true nature of the universe.

nodes.name: Grok
nodes.subtitle: AI Assistant by xAI
nodes.description: Grok is an AI modeled after the Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, intended to answer almost anything with a bit of wit.

nodes.name: Midjourney
nodes.subtitle: Independent Research Lab
nodes.description: Midjourney is an independent research lab exploring new mediums of thought and expanding the imaginative powers of the human species.

nodes.name: Diffusion Models
nodes.subtitle: Generative Models
nodes.description: Diffusion models are a class of latent variable models applied in image generation, audio synthesis, and more.
